subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Each Manifestation was alike great in himself, each spoke with the same authority, each alike breathed the spirit of God.
subcodes.subjects: @differences between the Manifestations; station of distinction, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @progress and the continual ascent of material civilization, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @oneness or innumerability of the Manifestations of God, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world
